title: geranium barringtonii
intro: Geranium barringtonii, also known as Barrington's geranium, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geranium barringtonii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for skin issues and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of Geranium barringtonii can be found in various forms, including tinctures, salves, and creams, which are often used topically to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
